cloudShellWarnings: Microsoft.CloudShell namespace is not registered for the subscription.
No-storage Cloud Shell session is ephemeral.

flightdeckOutcome.error: Unsupported region for Foundry Hosted Agents.

localProbe.responses: POST /responses returned Morgan setup-verification output without Azure OpenAI configured

foundryInvoke.outputText: Morgan is running as a hosted-agent container, but AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT is not configured. Mission Control, health, and audit endpoints are available for setup verification.

liveModel.note: Direct REST completed with model gpt-5-mini. MCP agent_invoke helper returned internal errors for v5-v7, so direct REST is the verified proof path.

errorsAndFixes.error: Foundry rejected PORT and AGENT_* environment variables as reserved.
errorsAndFixes.fix: Remove FOUNDRY_*, PORT, and AGENT_* variables from hosted-agent payloads.

errorsAndFixes.error: Flightdeck project is in unsupported uksouth region.
errorsAndFixes.fix: Provisioned a North Central US Foundry project with hosted agents enabled.

errorsAndFixes.error: Versions 1-3 failed invocation with session_not_ready because the full runtime constructed the Microsoft Agents SDK adapter without production ClientId.
errorsAndFixes.fix: Added src/foundryHost.ts and changed Docker CMD to node dist/foundryHost.js.

errorsAndFixes.error: Version 5 live model invoke failed because hosted identities did not yet have Azure OpenAI/Foundry RBAC and the payload did not include AZURE_CLIENT_ID.
errorsAndFixes.fix: Assigned Azure AI User and Cognitive Services OpenAI User to the instance and blueprint identities, then created version 7 with AZURE_CLIENT_ID set to the hosted instance identity.

errorsAndFixes.error: MCP agent_invoke helper returned internal server errors for live versions even after direct REST succeeded.
errorsAndFixes.fix: Use the direct Foundry hosted Responses route or azd invoke path for vNext proof until the helper path is corrected.

errorsAndFixes.error: Version 7 P0 integration-settings prompt drifted into deterministic Microsoft IQ briefing instead of listing required settings.
errorsAndFixes.fix: Version 10 uses a pre-showcase hosted readiness/configuration guard and explicit demo/deterministic labeling for end-of-day digest prompts.

remainingGates: Live Azure OpenAI direct REST proof and four-prompt P0 smoke succeeded for version 10.
Graph/MCP, ACS/Teams voice, observability, and durable storage values were intentionally not included.
Run managed Foundry batch evaluation after reviewing and adding live connector settings.
